emotion_and_vibe: Calm, trustworthy, spacious, warm, credentialed, and reassuring. Avoids generic SaaS medical blue. Replaces clinical coldness with an airy, botanical, premium wellness feel.

font_weights.headings: font-light to font-medium for a premium editorial look
font_weights.body: font-light or font-normal for high clarity in medical data

typography.hierarchy_rules: H1 max text-5xl to text-6xl with tracking-tight. Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase, text-xs, with wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]). Gap between heading and subheading must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.
typography.instructions: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or generic sans-serif for headings. Emphasize contrast between Serif headings and clean Sans body.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-8 or p-12 for breathing room. Optical alignment over geometrical.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: MODE A: TETRIS GRID. Asymmetrical, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12, wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Never fill 100% perfectly, leave negative space.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: MODE B: CONTROL ROOM GRID. Dense, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4, tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Ensure all widgets use h-full.
spacing_and_layout.corners: rounded-2xl for main cards and dialogs, rounded-full for pills and action buttons to keep it soft and approachable.

surfaces_and_shadows.cards: Flat solid surfaces. Mix soft ambient shadow (shadow-sm) with crisp 1px border (border-[#E5E0D8]) to ground it. No glassmorphism for health apps to prevent visual refraction of data.
surfaces_and_shadows.header: Solid background (bg-[#FAF9F6] or bg-white) with a hard bottom border, z-50. No transparent headers.
surfaces_and_shadows.jitsi_room_container: Give the telemedicine room a sleek border, rounded-2xl overflow-hidden, and a soft shadow-lg to pop from the background.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Explicit hover states (hover:bg-primary/90 hover:text-white). Focus states must have ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-primary/50.
motion_and_interaction.jitsi_room: Entrance animation: Framer motion scale up (0.95 to 1) with opacity fade over 0.4s.
motion_and_interaction.chat_bubbles: Staggered slide up (translate-y-4 to 0) and fade in (opacity 0 to 1) for AI Symptom Checker and Health Assistant.
motion_and_interaction.dashboards: Micro-interactions for feedback. Minimalist entrance for data cards.

components_strategy.marketing: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layouts. Hero section needs high impact, asymmetric layout. Form logic via Shadcn.
components_strategy.dashboard: Shadcn components heavily customized. Tables, Select, Cards, Dialogs with rounded-2xl, customized spacing, and our primary Moss Green color.
components_strategy.ai_features: Symptom checker and Report summarizer should feel like premium assistant interfaces, not standard chatbots. Use our secondary Terracotta color for AI insights to distinguish from standard data.
components_strategy.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='book-appointment-btn').

hero_background.description: Abstract, pastel colors and flowing shapes. Use as a warm inviting background overlay.

clinic_interior.description: Warm modern clinic interior for marketing features or about section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure tailwind.config.js with the provided color hex codes as CSS variables or direct extensions.
Build Shadcn components but override their default borders/radii to match '0.75rem' or '1rem' (rounded-2xl) and use the custom colors.
Wrap Patient Dashboard, Doctor Dashboard, Admin Dashboard, and Telemedicine Jitsi Room into distinct route segments with proper layout structures.
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all interactive elements.
DO NOT use placeholder URLs. Map the provided media URLs to the appropriate UI sections.
